texto: Whether we accept it or not, this will likely be the century that determines what the optimal human population is for our planet. It will come about in one of two ways: Either we decide to manage our own numbers, to avoid a collision of every line on civilization's graph - or nature will do it for us, in the form of famines, thirst, climate chaos, crashing ecosystems, opportunistic disease, and wars over dwindling resources that finally cut us down to size.
explicacao: Citação de Alan Weisman sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Whether we accept it or not, this will likely be the century that determines what the optimal hum…” articula fe, breeding, overpopulation em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como overpopulation e politics.

frase_original: Whether we accept it or not, this will likely be the century that determines what the optimal human population is for our planet. It will come about in one of two ways: Either we decide to manage our own numbers, to avoid a collision of every line on civilization's graph - or nature will do it for us, in the form of famines, thirst, climate chaos, crashing ecosystems, opportunistic disease, and wars over dwindling resources that finally cut us down to size.

texto: Paranormalists, however, insist that our minds are transmitters that, with special effort, can focus like lasers to communicate across great distances, and even make things happen. That may seem far-fetched, but it's also a definition of prayer.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alan Weisman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Paranormalists, however, insist that our minds are transmitters that, with special effort, can fo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, philosophy, science pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de science.
